title: Apply full system upgrade with pacman
outcome: System packages are updated to current repository versions without service regression.
facts: Arch is rolling-release and requires regular full upgrades
concepts: Atomic package refresh on rolling distributions

title: Regenerate initramfs after kernel module change
outcome: Boot image includes required modules and system boots successfully.

steps.completion: System boots and required module loads

title: Rotate pacman mirrorlist to fastest healthy mirrors
outcome: Package operations use responsive and reliable mirrors.
facts: Stale mirrors can cause partial upgrades and sync errors
dependencies: Reflector or mirror ranking tool available

steps.text: Run sync and verify package retrieval latency
steps.completion: Package sync succeeds with acceptable speed

title: Install and pin LTS kernel fallback
outcome: LTS kernel fallback is available for stability-sensitive hosts.
facts: Mainline kernel updates may introduce regressions

steps.completion: Host boots successfully on LTS kernel

title: Enable automatic signature key refresh for pacman
outcome: Package signature verification remains healthy and current.
facts: Outdated keyring causes signature verification failures

title: Harden sudo policy for admin group
outcome: Privileged command execution is restricted to approved policy set.
facts: Overbroad sudoers entries increase privilege abuse risk
concepts: Least privilege on privileged escalation paths

steps.text: Review existing sudoers and include files
Test allowed and denied sudo operations

title: Configure systemd-journald persistent retention policy
outcome: System logs persist across reboot with bounded retention.
facts: Default volatile logging can lose reboot history

steps.completion: journald stores logs in persistent path

title: Configure unattended security patch check workflow
outcome: Security-relevant package updates are surfaced automatically.
facts: Arch lacks native stable security channel semantics
concepts: Early detection of vulnerable package states

steps.text: Create scheduled package update check task

title: Lock critical package versions during release freeze
outcome: Selected packages remain pinned for controlled deployment window.
facts: Rolling updates can violate release freeze constraints

steps.text: Add IgnorePkg entries for freeze set
Run upgrade and confirm pinned packages unchanged

title: Baseline SSH daemon hardening on Arch host
outcome: SSHD configuration aligns with approved hardening profile.
facts: Weak auth methods should be disabled

steps.text: Validate configuration syntax and restart service
Test approved auth path and deny weak methods
steps.completion: Strong auth works; weak auth denied

title: Rotate machine identity SSH host keys
outcome: Host keys are rotated and clients updated through trust workflow.
facts: Key rotation requires client trust update coordination

steps.text: Update trust records and verify client connectivity
steps.completion: Clients connect with updated trust chain

title: Enable and validate nftables policy set
outcome: Host network filtering is enforced by approved nftables rules.

title: Configure time synchronization via chrony
outcome: Host clock is synchronized and drift remains within tolerance.
facts: Time skew can break auth and distributed operations

title: Create Btrfs snapshot rollback point before major update
outcome: Rollback snapshot exists prior to high-risk package update.
facts: Snapshots allow rapid recovery from failed upgrades

steps.text: Record snapshot metadata in change log
Validate snapshot visibility in management tool

title: Verify AUR package build reproducibility baseline
outcome: AUR package build process is controlled and reproducible.
facts: AUR packages are community maintained and require trust controls
